full_text:
Du Shu (Wubo) 杜恕 (務伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Shu (杜恕), styledWubo (務伯), was born in Duling in Jingzhao. Rebuked Cao Rui for failing to get the best out of his court and failing to inspire them to loyal services. Du Shu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Du Shu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
